_comment: Per-sport site identity — single source of truth for org/website JSON-LD across sports. A competition resolves its site via its top-level `sport` field (see config/competitions.json); competitions with no `sport` (every existing soccer comp) fall back to the `soccer` block here. The `soccer` block MUST stay byte-identical to the legacy SITE/ORG_NAME constants in build-articles.py — the soccer rebuild regression (zero diff on public/) is the contract. `base` has no trailing slash (code appends it).

baseball.website_name: @baseball — 中職 CPBL ＋ 大聯盟 MLB 深度戰報
